## Summary

What does this PR change, and why?

## Scope

- [ ] Applied to `cz/crystalex-product-badges.php`
- [ ] Applied to `en/crystalex-product-badges.php`
- [ ] Documentation only (README/CHANGELOG)

## Checklist

- [ ] Behavioural changes are mirrored in both plugin variants (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] `Version:` header bumped in both plugins (if this is a release-worthy change)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] Relevant `README.md` updated (root / `cz/` / `en/`)
- [ ] `php -l` passes on both plugin files
- [ ] `composer run lint` (PHPCS) passes, or deviations are explained below

How did you verify this change works (manual steps in WP admin, specific product states tested, etc.)?
